name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA allowing both parties to share confidential information for a defined purpose, with reciprocal confidentiality obligations.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template to accompany the Mutual NDA Standard Terms, containing party details, effective date, term, governing law, and signature blocks.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement for SaaS providers covering service access, restrictions, privacy, payment, indemnification, and liability for cloud-based products.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early-access design partner programs where a partner receives pre-release product access in exchange for structured feedback to help the provider improve the product.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Defines uptime targets, response time commitments, service credit calculations, and remedies for cloud service providers and their customers.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Framework agreement for professional services engagements covering SOW-based delivery, IP assignment of deliverables, payment terms, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-compliant agreement governing how a service provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including subprocessor rules, security incidents, and international data transfers.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement for on-premise or self-hosted software products, covering license scope, restrictions, warranty, updates, and subscription-based payment terms.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for business partnerships covering co-obligations, trademark licensing, payment, confidentiality, and joint indemnification responsibilities.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement allowing a customer to evaluate a product during a pilot period before committing to a definitive agreement, with minimal warranties and liability.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-required agreement between a covered entity and a business associate governing the use, disclosure, and protection of protected health information (PHI).

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum to a base agreement governing the use of AI and machine learning services, covering model training restrictions, IP ownership of outputs, and AI-specific disclaimers.
